channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Senate confirms Kevin Warsh as next Federal Reserve chair
item.description: Warsh believes the central bank can lower interest rates, but rising inflation may complicate that approach.

item.title: Neanderthals may have performed dental drilling 59,000 years ago
item.description: A Paleolithic tooth suggests Neanderthals were capable of carrying out a precise dental procedure.

item.title: Springtime in Seville brings a local delicacy: caracoles
item.description: In Seville, spring marks snail season. Unlike French escargot, these are smaller and eaten directly from the shell.

item.title: Alex Murdaugh to receive a new murder trial; case timeline reviewed
item.description: Disgraced former lawyer Alex Murdaugh, serving life for killing his wife and son, will get a new trial in South Carolina.
